page_metadata.biotools__summary: A web server that provides structural alignment of RNA without the help of a reference genome. It takes into account nucleotide sequence similarity, dihedral angle similarity and nucleotide base-pairing similarity.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A web server that provides structural alignment of RNA without the help of a reference genome. It takes into account nucleotide sequence similarity, dihedral angle similarity and nucleotide base-pairing similarity.
